entry.title: New: CR 24-129 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending REFERRAL of bills to the Council Chair for the term beginning January 2, 2025, relating to: (1) amending Chapter 3.75, Maui County Code, relating to Community Facilities Districts; (2) amending Section 18.20.140, Maui County Code, relating to utility lines and facilities; (3) amending Section 16.25.201, Maui County Code, relating to improvements to public streets; and (4) amending Chapter 2.60, Maui County Code, on reports of civil fines.

Water and Infrastructure Committee (2023-2025)

View on the council site
